name: lightchain-quickstart-inference
description: End-to-end encrypted LightChain AI inference using lightnode-sdk. Runs one job and prints the decrypted answer. ~120 lines, all wire-tested.

scripts.start:testnet: NETWORK=testnet tsx index.ts "Reply with a one-sentence fun fact about the ocean."
scripts.start:mainnet: NETWORK=mainnet tsx index.ts "Reply with a one-sentence fun fact about the ocean."
